knownGaps: Diagnostic-only inventory row; no renderer support is claimed yet.
SymbolIcon is rendered as a static glyph diagnostic; exact icon font metrics and state variants remain partial.
The fixture includes a bounded bootstrap marker, but the full Fluent resource dictionary is not loaded.
Theme dictionaries resolve active light, dark, and high-contrast scenario resources for the clean-room subset; dynamic invalidation remains planned.
ThemeResource resolves through the active scenario theme dictionary for the clean-room subset.
StaticResource currently resolves through a simple dictionary lookup.
Style support is limited to simple setter application.
Setter support is limited to supported facade properties.
Color resources render deterministic swatches for public evidence; full typed color object fidelity remains planned.
SolidColorBrush resources render deterministic swatches for public evidence; full brush object fidelity remains planned.
CornerRadius resources are applied to bounded renderer geometry; full WinUI corner resource behavior remains partial.
System backdrop and Mica are explicit planned diagnostics with no material rendering claim.
